title: marlimorimia warmingii
side_effects: Marlimorimia warmingii can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive dizziness, nausea, and stomach discomfort due to its high content of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to these compounds can also lead to more severe issues like kidney damage, respiratory problems, and even heart palpitations in susceptible individuals. In some cases, improper use of the plant may also cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and swelling, particularly in people with pre-existing sensitivities. It's essential to exercise extreme caution and consult a medical professional before using Marlimorimia warmingii or any other plant with potential health risks.
